  "findings": [
    "Disconnect not within sight of motor per NEC 430.102(B)"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Relocate disconnect switch to a location within sight and less than 50 ft from the motor controller location per NEC 430.102(B) and 430.102(A) exception"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 430.102(B) requires a disconnecting means to be located within sight from the motor and driven machinery. The observed field condition 'disconnect not within sight' is a direct violation of this requirement, posing a safety hazard during maintenance or emergency shutdown.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Art. 430.102(B)"
  ]
}
